udt_error_enum_v0.doc: Explicit discriminants pin the wire format. Frontends match on these\nnumeric codes \xe2\x80\x94 do not renumber or reorder.
udt_error_enum_v0.name: Error

event_v0.doc: Emitted by `spend` when the policy doesn't block, AND by `approve_request`\nafter a blocked spend is approved. The dashboard treats both the same way.
event_v0.name: Spend

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Profile travels with the address everywhere we render a member \xe2\x80\x94 name
shows in summary/activity/feed, emoji is the avatar. The frontend allows
only a curated emoji set (mango, palm, flower, money, star, sun) so this
stays a tiny string per row.
udt_struct_v0.name: Member

tuple_v0.doc: (caller, day_epoch) \xe2\x86\x92 cumulative spent that day. Day epoch is\n`ledger.timestamp() / SECONDS_PER_DAY`, so each new UTC day starts a\nfresh counter without explicit reset.
tuple_v0.name: DailySpent

void_v0.doc: Address of the SobreFactory that deployed this instance. Read on\n`upgrade()` so the admin can opt into the factory's current wasm hash\nwithout having to remember it themselves.
void_v0.name: Factory

event_v0.doc: Emitted by `deposit`. Topic list: ("Deposit", from). Data map:\n{amount, groceries, tuition, savings}. The frontend filters on the\n"Deposit" topic to drive the live transaction feed.
event_v0.name: Deposit

udt_union_v0.doc: Variant order is wire contract: the `balances` Vec<i128> and the `percents`\nVec<u32> are indexed [Groceries, Tuition, Savings]. Reordering or inserting\nwould silently break every dashboard reading deployed contracts.
udt_union_v0.name: Envelope

udt_struct_v0.doc: All three checks compose with OR \xe2\x80\x94 any one triggering routes the spend\nto admin approval. Default (no policy set) leaves all spends open.
udt_struct_v0.name: SpendPolicy

fields.doc: Cap on cumulative daily spend per caller (in stroops). None = no cap.
fields.name: daily_limit

fields.doc: Envelopes a member can't spend from directly \xe2\x80\x94 admin must approve.
fields.name: protected_envelopes

fields.doc: When true, every spend needs admin approval regardless of amount.
fields.name: require_all_sigs

udt_struct_v0.doc: Composite view returned to the frontend in one call.
udt_struct_v0.name: WalletState

function_v0.doc:
One-time setup. The caller becomes the admin AND the first profiled
member of the wallet. `factory` is the SobreFactory that deployed this
instance; `upgrade()` reads its `current_sobre_wasm` view to opt this
Sobre into the latest contract code without trusting the admin to
pass the right hash by hand.
function_v0.name: init

function_v0.doc:
Members-only. Routes through the configured SpendPolicy:
- if no policy triggers (or the caller is admin), transfers tokens
and emits Spend
- if any policy condition triggers, creates a PendingRequest and emits
RequestCreated (no transfer; admin must approve_request later)
function_v0.name: spend

event_v0.doc: Emitted when a non-admin self-joins via the invite-link flow.
event_v0.name: MemberJoined

event_v0.doc: Emitted when admin closes the wallet via `close_wallet`. Records the\ntotal stroops swept back to admin so the activity feed can render\n"\xe2\x82\xb1X swept to admin \xc2\xb7 wallet closed" without re-reading balances.
event_v0.name: WalletClosed

event_v0.doc: Emitted when admin kicks a member.
event_v0.name: MemberRemoved

event_v0.doc: Emitted when admin denies a pending request. No transfer happens.
event_v0.name: RequestDenied

event_v0.doc: Emitted when admin renames the wallet via `set_wallet_name`.
event_v0.name: WalletRenamed

udt_struct_v0.doc: Created by `spend` when policy triggers; resolved by `approve_request`\n(executes the transfer) or `deny_request` (drops it).
udt_struct_v0.name: PendingRequest

function_v0.doc:
Admin-only. Opt this Sobre into the factory's current SobreContract
wasm. Same contract address, same storage, new code on the next call.
Reads the target hash from the factory rather than taking it as an
argument so the admin can't fat-finger a wrong or malicious wasm.

Trust assumption: whoever holds the factory's admin key controls what
wasm this Sobre adopts on `upgrade()`. Move the factory admin to a
multisig + timelock before mainnet.
function_v0.name: upgrade

event_v0.doc: Emitted when `spend` is policy-blocked and queued for admin approval\ninstead of executing. Lifecycle: RequestCreated \xe2\x86\x92 RequestApproved | RequestDenied.
event_v0.name: RequestCreated

event_v0.doc: Emitted when the admin opts this Sobre into a new wasm via `upgrade`.\nThe new code takes effect on the next invocation; storage is unchanged.
event_v0.name: WalletUpgraded

event_v0.doc: Emitted when admin approves a pending request. The transfer that follows\nalso emits a Spend event, so this is purely a correlation signal.
event_v0.name: RequestApproved

function_v0.doc: Polled by both dashboards every 2-3s. Returns admin, payment token,\nwallet name, envelope split + balances, profiled members, the active\nSpendPolicy, and the list of pending requests \xe2\x80\x94 in one call.
function_v0.name: get_state

event_v0.doc: Emitted when admin renames the envelopes via `set_envelope_names`.
event_v0.name: EnvelopesRenamed

function_v0.doc: Admin-only. Replace the entire spending policy in one call. Any spend\nthat lands AFTER this updates against the new policy immediately.
function_v0.name: set_policy

function_v0.doc: Self-service join used by the invite-link flow. Anyone with the link\ncan call this until the 2-member cap is reached \xe2\x80\x94 the cap is the\ndemo's safety net since the URL itself isn't authenticated.
function_v0.name: join_wallet

function_v0.doc:
Admin-only. Sweeps every envelope balance back to admin in a single
SEP-41 transfer and zeroes the envelopes. The wallet remains callable
\xe2\x80\x94 re-depositing would re-split per the current percentages \xe2\x80\x94 but for
the demo this represents "closing the wallet."
function_v0.name: close_wallet

function_v0.doc: Admin-only. Drop a pending request without transferring anything.
function_v0.name: deny_request

function_v0.doc: Auto-invoked on deploy_v2 with the constructor args, so the\nSobreFactory can deploy + init atomically (no front-run window).\nManual deploys can still call `init` directly with the same args.
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc: Admin-only. Kicks a member out of the wallet. The admin cannot kick\nthemselves \xe2\x80\x94 `close_wallet` is the right tool for shutting down.
function_v0.name: remove_member

function_v0.doc: Admin-only. Overwrite the envelope percentage split. Only affects how\nFUTURE deposits are distributed \xe2\x80\x94 existing balances are untouched.
function_v0.name: set_envelopes

function_v0.doc: Admin-only. Execute a previously created pending request. Emits both\n`Spend` (for the transfer) and `RequestApproved` (for correlation).
function_v0.name: approve_request

function_v0.doc: Admin-only. Renames the wallet (the "Pagunsan Family" string at the\ntop of both dashboards).
function_v0.name: set_wallet_name

function_v0.doc: Admin-only. Rename the three envelopes. Purely cosmetic \xe2\x80\x94 the on-chain\n`Envelope::Groceries|Tuition|Savings` enum still indexes balances and\npolicies, so existing pending requests + balances stay valid.
function_v0.name: set_envelope_names
